_comment: Grandfathered violations from before Phase 0 § Stream B (NEWT-1539) per-pack edits.
The lint guard ratchet: this allowlist can only SHRINK, never grow.
- Any NEW violation (not in this list) fails CI.
- Any STALE entry (no longer firing) fails CI — forces deletion.
- As each Stream B per-pack PR migrates a pack to wrapOutput, it
removes that pack's entries from this file in the same commit.
Format: file path relative to repo root + 1-indexed line + 0-indexed column.
Line numbers MUST match the AST-lint output (acorn 1-indexed lines).
Baseline (2026-06-13): 20 violations across 9 packs. Each Stream B PR
removes its pack's block. When this list is empty, flip the lint guard
to strict mode (no allowlist) — see scripts/lint-policy-js.ts main().
